title: GAP-A: Rewrite SecretUri::parse() for opaque URI format
description: Why: The current parser expects secretx://backend/path; the new format is secretx:backend:/path (opaque URI, no authority component). This is the critical-path blocker for the entire h7n epic.\n\nWhat: Change const SCHEME from 'secretx://' to 'secretx:' in secretx-core/src/lib.rs. Rewrite parse() to split the opaque part on the first colon to extract backend, then treat the remainder as path (preserving leading slash for absolute paths). Query string (?field=x) parsing stays unchanged. Public API (.backend(), .path(), .param()) stays identical.
